Localization.Description: Exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2024-21683 in Confluence. The vulnerability allows an authenticated user to download and execute arbitrary malicious code through the "Add a new language" function in the "Code" macro settings section.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Exploitation of vulnerability {detect} in Confluence as user "{subject.account.name}". Suspicious process "{object.process.name}" is started from parent process "{object.process.parent.name}" on host {event_src.host}.
